expansion_tracker_eXP211_collision.summary: EXP-211 was allocated twice: (1) decider pushed WIN-038 eigenvalue task (pending, 2026-04-21T22:34Z), (2) prior analyst wrote design-refresh accuracy-math under same ID in workspace (complete, 2026-04-21T23:09Z). workspace-sync later overwrote clone's WIN-038 entry with the design-refresh one. A second analyst ran against the now-overwritten tracker and found WIN-038 still pending, wrote EXP-211.json with WIN-038 content, overwriting the design-refresh EXP-211.json in the workspace. Design-refresh content cannot be recovered from workspace.
expansion_tracker_eXP211_collision.resolution: WIN-038 work reallocated to EXP-214 and integrated. Design-refresh accuracy-math will need re-drafting under a new EXP ID when analyst next runs Phase A.
expansion_tracker_eXP211_collision.root_cause: Non-atomic EXP-ID allocation across concurrent workspace+clone writers. next_id counter lives in both files independently.
